description: Deed of sale. In Arabic script. Abū l-Bayān Ibrāhīm b. Mubārak b. Mufarrij al-Isrā'īlī purchases a property. Mentions the rights to the millstone (al-ḥajar) and the mill (al-ṭāḥūn). There are jottings in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic on both recto and verso (some possibly in the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli). (Information in part from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
